## [EVIDENCE-20260526-AIBEOPCHIN-LEGAL-STRATEGY-PHASE63E-LAWYER-REVIEW-ADOPTION-GATE]

### Status

COMPLETE · LOCKED · 63-E.1 — Lawyer Review & Adoption Gate.

### One-line Standard

Phase 63-E는 63-D CounterArgumentDraftParagraph에 대해 변호사의 ADOPT / MODIFY / REJECT 결정을 기록하고, ADOPT 또는 MODIFY 항목만 DocumentInsertCandidate로 승격하도록 고정했다. REJECT 항목은 문서 반영 후보가 될 수 없으며, 승격된 항목도 isFinalDocumentText, clientVisibleAllowed, autoFileAllowed가 모두 false로 유지된다. 모든 채택·수정 결정은 Lawyer Decision Ledger와 auditRef 아래에서만 가능하다.

### Scope

- `src/features/legal-strategy/counter-argument-engine/phase63e-lawyer-review-adoption.schema.ts`
- `src/features/legal-strategy/counter-argument-engine/phase63e-lawyer-review-adoption.policy.ts`
- `src/features/legal-strategy/counter-argument-engine/phase63e-lawyer-review-adoption.service.ts`
- `adoptDraftParagraph()` · `modifyDraftParagraph()` · `rejectDraftParagraph()` · `processLawyerAdoptionReview()`
- Gates: `verify:aibeopchin-legal-strategy-phase63e` + `verify:aibeopchin-legal-strategy-phase63d` + `verify:aibeopchin-control-tower-brain-rc`

### Verification

- `npm run verify:aibeopchin-legal-strategy-phase63e` PASS

## [EVIDENCE-20260526-AIBEOPCHIN-LEGAL-STRATEGY-PHASE63D-DRAFT-PARAGRAPH-GENERATOR]

### Status

COMPLETE · LOCKED · 63-D.1 — Draft Paragraph Generator.

### One-line Standard

Phase 63-D는 63-C BackfireRiskReport를 통과한 CounterArgumentCandidate에 대해서만 CounterArgumentDraftParagraph를 생성하도록 고정했다. CRITICAL risk 후보는 문단 생성에서 제외되며, 생성된 문단은 isFinalDocumentText, documentInsertAllowed, clientVisibleAllowed, autoFileAllowed가 모두 false로 고정된다. 모든 문단 후보는 LAWYER_REVIEW_REQUIRED 상태로 시작하고 sourceTrace와 auditRef를 필수로 가진다.

### Scope

- `src/features/legal-strategy/counter-argument-engine/phase63d-draft-paragraph-generator.schema.ts`
- `src/features/legal-strategy/counter-argument-engine/phase63d-draft-paragraph-generator.policy.ts`
- `src/features/legal-strategy/counter-argument-engine/phase63d-draft-paragraph-generator.service.ts`

- Gates: `verify:aibeopchin-legal-strategy-phase63d` + `verify:aibeopchin-legal-strategy-phase63c` + `verify:aibeopchin-control-tower-brain-rc`

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-PLATFORM-CONTENT-PROTECTION]

### Status

COMPLETE — 크롤링·정적 유출·무인증 접근·브루트포스 완화 + at-rest 암호화 보강.

### One-line Standard

사건 첨부는 `public/` 정적 서빙을 중단하고 AES-256-GCM private storage에 저장하며, `/uploads/*` 직접 접근은 middleware 404, robots·HTTP 보안 헤더·인증 rate limit·HMAC 토큰 pepper로 구성 누출·스크래핑 표면을 줄인다.

### Scope

- `src/lib/crypto/at-rest-encryption.ts` — AES-256-GCM (APP_DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY)
- `src/lib/crypto/secret-token-hash.ts` — v2 HMAC pepper + legacy SHA-256 호환
- `src/lib/security/platform-content-protection.policy.ts` — SSOT
- `src/lib/security/http-security-headers.ts` + `next.config.ts` headers
- `src/middleware.ts` — `/uploads/*` 404
- `src/features/case-attachments/case-attachment.storage.ts` — private encrypted blob
- `src/lib/security/auth-rate-limit.ts` — login/signup/signup-lawyer
- `src/lib/robots-disallow-policy.ts` — `/uploads/`, `/private-encrypted/`

### Verification

- `npm run verify:aibeopchin-platform-content-protection` PASS

### Production env (필수)

- `APP_DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY` — 32바이트 (base64 또는 64자 hex)
- `SECRET_TOKEN_PEPPER` — 16자 이상

Phase 59-B는 실시간 법령·판례·운영 신호를 AI 판단에 직접 주입하지 않고, 상태 전이, 출처 추적, 충돌 검사, 최신성 검사, 변호사 검토, Compiler Policy를 거쳐 APPROVED_FOR_AI_USE 신호만 공부호 기반 강추론에 사용할 수 있도록 고정했다.

**선행**: Phase **59-A** · `[EVIDENCE-20260526-AIBEOPCHIN-GONGBUHO-INTELLIGENCE-PHASE59A-MEMORY-PACKET-SCHEMA]`

**다음**: **59-C** Gongbuho Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning

**버전** **`59-B.1`**

Operation completion is now lawyer-controlled. Client responses and uploads can trigger review, but only a lawyer or admin completion decision with ledger and audit record can complete an operation or confirm evidence for downstream use.

Phase 50-C links client portal responses, supplement submissions, and uploaded files to LegalReliabilityActionOperations, while preventing client responses from completing operations or uploaded files from becoming confirmed evidence without lawyer review.

- Lawyer review queue handoff

- AuditLog events

Phase 50-B assigns owners, due dates, priorities, and SLA statuses to LegalReliabilityActionOperations so Command Center can track operational delay, upcoming deadlines, overdue items, client-blocked actions, and lawyer-review queues without automatic escalation or completion.

### Scope

- Operation assignment
- Due date setting
- Priority update
- SLA status calculation

- AuditLog events for assignment and due-date changes

- NO_AUTO_LEGAL_FILING
- NO_CLIENT_UPLOAD_AUTO_EVIDENCE_CONFIRMATION

- `src/features/legal-reliability-action-operations/legal-reliability-action-operation-assignment.policy.ts`

**경계**: NO_DIRECT_COURT_ACCESS / NO_MEDIATOR_PORTAL_BY_DEFAULT / NO_OPPOSING_PARTY_AUTO_SHARE / LAWYER_CONTROLLED_EXPORT_ONLY / NO_INTERNAL_STRATEGY_IN_NEUTRAL_PACK / NO_UNREVIEWED_AI_OUTPUT / NO_CLIENT_CONFIDENTIAL_MEMO

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-DATA-GOVERNANCE-PHASE19B-PII-LEGAL-REDACTION]

### 1. 목적

Phase **19-B** — **PII / Legal Sensitive Redaction**. 19-A registry tier를 **운영 출력 경로**에 적용 — display · export · audit · failurePayload · AI metadata.

### 2. Scope

- `data-redaction-policy.schema.ts` · `.registry.ts`
- `data-redaction.service.ts` · `.validator.ts`
- Output paths: AuditLog.metadata · RetryJob.failurePayload · ExternalMessageLog · DocumentPipelineJob · AI audit · VoiceTranscript · CaseIntelligenceSnapshot · LitigationExtractedText
- Integration: `writeAuditLog` · audit export · retry-job persist · voice ops · AI public-safe audit
- Runbook: `AIBEOPCHIN_DATA_REDACTION_RUNBOOK.md`

**한 줄 기준**: PII·법률 민감 데이터는 표시·export·audit·failurePayload·AI metadata 경로에서 원문 노출 금지

**선행**: Phase **19-A** Data Retention Policy

**버전** **`19-B.1`**

### 3. 검증

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-data-governance-phase19b
```

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-RELIABILITY-PHASE18D-AI-FALLBACK-CIRCUIT-BREAKER]

### 1. 목적

Phase **18-D** — **AI Fallback & Circuit Breaker**. provider 장애·rate limit·timeout·budget·safety denial 시 **무작정 재시도하지 않고** fallback / 차단 / 수동 전환 / circuit breaker 적용.

### 2. Scope

- `ai-fallback-circuit-breaker.schema.ts` · `.policy.ts` · `.service.ts`
- `ai-circuit-state.store.ts` — in-process provider circuit (OPEN/HALF_OPEN/CLOSED)
- `classifyAiFailureReason` · `evaluateAiFallbackPolicy` · `handleAiProviderCallFailure`
- RetryJob `AI_CALL` sourceType + migration
- AI runtime 연동: `ai-core-runtime.service.ts` · `case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts`
- Audit: `AI_FALLBACK_INVOKED` · `AI_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPENED`
- Runbook: `AIBEOPCHIN_AI_FALLBACK_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_RUNBOOK.md`

**원칙**: task별 fallback · safety/budget no-retry · circuit open on repeated failure · client public fallback blocked

**선행**: Phase **18-A** · **18-B** · **18-C**

**버전** **`18-D.1`**


## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-SECURE-DOCUMENT-KAKAO-NOTICE-PHASE15F]

### 1. 목적

Phase **15-F** — 변호사가 **LegalDocument**를 의뢰인에게 **CaseSharedDocument / CaseDocumentDelivery**로 공유하고, 카카오 알림톡(스텁)은 **원본 미첨부·로그인 보안 링크**만 전달. `ClientNotificationPreference` · `ExternalMessageLog` · 만료 · 열람 로그.

### 2. Scope

**Prisma**
- `CaseDocumentDelivery` — secureLinkTokenHash, tokenExpiresAt, channel, status
- `ExternalMessageLog` — provider stub, payloadSummaryJson (containsFileAttachment: false)
- `ClientNotificationPreference.documentShareNoticeEnabled`
- `CaseSharedDocument.firstViewedAt`

**Feature** `src/features/secure-document-delivery/`

**API**
- `POST /api/cases/[caseId]/shared-documents`
- `POST /api/cases/[caseId]/shared-documents/[shareId]/send-kakao`
- `GET /api/client/cases/[caseId]/shared-documents/[shareId]`
- `POST /api/client/cases/[caseId]/shared-documents/[shareId]/mark-viewed`

**UI**
- Command Center `lcc-section-shared-documents`
- Client Portal 공유 자료함 · 보안 열람

**안전 원칙**
- 카카오 미동의 → SKIPPED_NO_CONSENT + IN_APP fallback
- 메시지 본문에 파일 원본 미포함
- 로그인 후 열람 · token hash · 만료시간 · AuditLog

**버전** **`15-F.1`**

### 3. 검증

```bash
npx prisma generate
npm run verify:aibeopchin-secure-document-kakao-notice-phase15f
npm run test -- src/features/secure-document-delivery
```

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-COURT-SCHEDULE-CLIENT-REMINDER-PHASE15E]

### 1. 목적

Phase **15-E** — 변호사 Command Center에서 **재판기일·마감 직접 등록**, **의뢰인 알림 예약(D-14/7/3/1/0)**, 의뢰인 포털 **다음 재판기일 표시**. 카카오·이메일은 동의·예약·로그만(실발송은 15-F).

- `POST /api/cases/[caseId]/deadlines` — 수동 기일 등록
- `POST /api/cases/[caseId]/deadlines/[deadlineId]/notify-client` — 알림 예약
- `GET /api/client/cases/[caseId]/deadlines` — 의뢰인 기일 목록

- `lcc-section-deadlines` — 기일 등록 폼 · `CommandCenterDeadlineRow` (알림 예약 · D-7 · 카카오 대기 건수)

**Client Portal**
- `nextCourtDeadlineDisplay` — 사건 상세 헤더 다음 재판기일

**안전 원칙 (15-E 경계)**
- 의뢰인 미동의 시 `SKIPPED_NO_CONSENT` 로그
- KAKAO/EMAIL은 SCHEDULED stub (15-F에서 ExternalMessageLog·보안 링크)

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-COMMAND-CENTER-CHAT-ADOPT-PHASE15C3]

### 1. 목적

Phase **15-C.3** — Litigation Command Center **사건 대화** 섹션에서 변호사가 채팅 메시지·첨부를 **사건기록/증거 후보**로 채택하고, **13-G Review Queue**로 이동하는 UX.

### 2. Scope

**API**
- `POST .../messages/[messageId]/adopt-record` — `scope: body | attachment | all`, `uploadedFileId`
- `case-conversation-adopt.service.ts` — 중복 채택 방지 · AuditLog · reviewItemIds 반환

**Command Center**
- `conversationMessages[]` — bodyAdopted · attachment.adopted · reviewItemId
- UI `lcc-section-conversation` — 채택 버튼 · Review Queue 링크
- Action feed — `CASE_CONVERSATION_MESSAGE_ADOPTED` · `CASE_CONVERSATION_ATTACHMENT_ADOPTED`

**Review Queue**
- `buildPortalReviewItemsFromStoredDecisions` — 부분 채택(첨부만)도 큐에 표시

**버전** **`15-C.3.1`**

### 3. 검증

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-supplement-tracking-phase15a
npm run test -- src/features/client-portal/case-conversation-adopt.service.test.ts
npm run test -- src/features/document-intelligence/litigation-command-center
```

---

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-CLIENT-STATEMENT-REVIEW-GATE-PHASE15C2]

### 1. 목적

Phase **15-C.2** — `adopt-record` 및 제출 **ACCEPTED** 시 **CLIENT_STATEMENT** 후보를 **13-G Review Queue**에 등록. 포털 채택(1차)과 검토 확정(2차)을 분리하여, **LAWYER_CONFIRMED 전까지 downstream 확정자료로 사용하지 않음**.

### 2. Scope

**DB (migration `20260525160000_client_portal_phase15c2_review_gate`)**
- `LitigationDocumentIntelligenceReviewPhase` — `PHASE_15B` · `PHASE_15C`

**Review Gate SSOT**
- `client-portal-review-candidate.service.ts` — itemId 규칙 · enqueue · queue builder merge
- `document-intelligence-review.schema.ts` — `client_statement` category · `CLIENT_STATEMENT` ledger · version **`13-G.2`**

**연동**
- `adoptCaseConversationMessageAsRecordService` → `enqueueChatMessageReviewCandidates`
- `reviewSubmission(ACCEPTED)` → `enqueueClientSubmissionReviewCandidates`
- `buildDocumentIntelligenceReviewQueue` — portalSources 병합
- Intelligence Review UI — `의뢰인 제출` / `채팅` 필터 · `의뢰인 진술` 라벨

**버전**
- `CLIENT_PORTAL_VERSION` · `LITIGATION_COMMAND_CENTER_VERSION` → **`15-C.2.1`**

### 3. 15-C.2 경계

| 허용 | 금지 |
| --- | --- |
| adopt/ACCEPTED → NEEDS_LAWYER_REVIEW 큐 등록 | adopt 즉시 downstreamUsable |
| 13-G confirm → LAWYER_CONFIRMED → ops sync | 채팅/제출 자동 사건기록 |

### 4. 검증

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-supplement-tracking-phase15a
npm run test -- src/features/client-portal/client-portal-review-candidate.service.test.ts
npm run test -- src/features/document-intelligence/document-intelligence-review-queue.builder.test.ts
```

---

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-CLIENT-FILE-UPLOAD-PHASE15B]

### 1. 목적

Phase **15-B** — 의뢰인이 **보완요청별·사건 단위**로 서류·증거를 업로드·설명·제출하고, **담당 변호사/스태프**에게 공유. 업로드 파일은 **13-B~13-I LitigationUploadedFile → extract → classify → analyze** 파이프라인으로 연결되되 **변호사 채택 전까지 확정 사건자료 아님**.

### 2. Scope

**DB (migration `20260525150000_client_portal_phase15bc_intake_chat`)**
- `ClientSubmissionFile.description` — 파일 설명
- `ClientSubmissionReview` 연동 준비

**상태 SSOT**
- `client-submission-status.portal.ts` — `CLIENT_DRAFT` … `ACCEPTED_AS_CASE_RECORD` / `NEEDS_MORE_INFO` / `REJECTED`

**서비스**
- `saveClientSubmissionDraftService` · `submitFreeUploadService` · `receiveClientSubmissionService` · `startReviewClientSubmissionService`
- `client-submission-intake.service.ts` — 수신/검토/채택 시 DI 큐 + AuditLog

**API**
- `POST /api/client/cases/[caseId]/submissions/draft` · `.../free-upload`
- `POST .../client-submissions/[id]/receive` · `.../start-review` · accept · request-more-info · reject

**UI**
- 의뢰인 포털 **자료 제출** 탭 (사건 단위 free-upload + 공유 범위 안내)
- Command Center **의뢰인 제출자료** — 수신/검토/채택/추가요청(메모 입력)
- schema version **`15-B/C.1`**

### 3. 15-B 경계

| 허용 | 금지 |
| --- | --- |
| SUBMITTED → LAWYER_RECEIVED → UNDER_REVIEW → ACCEPTED | 업로드 즉시 사건자료 |
| DI 파이프라인 큐 (비확정) | 의뢰인이 Command Center 접근 |

### 4. 검증

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-supplement-tracking-phase15a
npm run test -- src/features/client-portal/client-submission-status.portal.test.ts
npm run test -- src/features/document-intelligence/litigation-command-center
```

---

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-CASE-CONVERSATION-PHASE15C]

### 1. 목적

Phase **15-C** — 사건 단위 **보안 채팅**. 의뢰인·변호사·STAFF가 메시지·첨부를 주고받고, **읽음·AuditLog** 기록. 채팅은 **변호사 사건기록 채택 전까지 확정 사실 아님**.

### 2. Scope

**DB**
- `CaseMessageAttachment` — 채팅 첨부 ↔ `LitigationUploadedFile`

**서비스**
- `case-conversation.service.ts` — 메시지 CRUD · 첨부 · `adoptCaseConversationMessageAsRecordService` (Review Queue 후속 stub)

**API**
- `GET/POST /api/client/cases/[caseId]/messages` (`attachmentIds`)
- `GET/POST /api/cases/[caseId]/messages`
- `POST .../messages/[messageId]/adopt-record`

**UI**
- 의뢰인 포털 **사건 대화** 탭 — 메시지 + 파일 첨부
- Command Center **채팅 미확인** 배지 (`caseUnreadMessageCount`)

### 3. 15-C 경계

| 허용 | 금지 |
| --- | --- |
| 채팅 + 첨부 (비확정) | 메시지 자동 CLIENT_STATEMENT |
| 변호사 adopt-record (감사) | 알림 push (후속) |

### 4. 검증

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-supplement-tracking-phase15a
npm run test -- src/features/client-portal
```

---

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-CLIENT-LAWYER-COLLABORATION-PORTAL-PHASE15A]

### 1. 목적

Phase **15-A (full)** — 변호사 내부 운영 플랫폼에서 **변호사-의뢰인 협업 포털**로 확장. 의뢰인이 보완요청 확인·요청별 파일+답변 제출·제출 이력·공유 자료·사건 단위 채팅을 이용하고, 제출 자료는 **13-B~13-I LitigationUploadedFile 파이프라인**으로 연결되되 **변호사 검토·채택 전까지 확정 사건자료 아님**. Command Center에 **보완자료 도착** 반영.

### 2. Scope

**DB (migration `20260525140000_client_portal_collaboration_phase15a`)**
- `CaseClientPortalAccess` · `ClientSubmission` · `ClientSubmissionFile`
- `CaseConversationThread` · `CaseConversationMessage` · `CaseSharedDocument`

**의뢰인 API (`/api/client/cases/...`)**
- 사건 목록/요약 · 보완요청 · `submit`(파일+메시지) · 파일 업로드 · 공유 문서 · 메시지 · 제출 이력

**변호사 API**
- `GET/POST .../client-submissions` · accept / request-more-info / reject
- `GET/POST .../messages`

**UI**
- `/client/cases/[caseId]` — 6탭 포털(진행·보완·업로드·공유·채팅·이력) + 법친이 안내
- Command Center `clientSubmissionPendingCount` · 「보완자료 도착」 섹션
- schema version **`15-A.2`**

### 3. 15-A 경계

| 허용 | 금지 |
| --- | --- |
| CLIENT_SUBMITTED → 변호사 검토 → ACCEPTED 후 사건자료 | 업로드 즉시 확정자료 |
| 채팅 = 비확정 커뮤니케이션 | 채팅 자동 CLIENT_STATEMENT |
| Supplement SENT → portal submit → Command Center | 의뢰인 Command Center 전체 접근 |

### 4. 검증

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-supplement-tracking-phase15a
npm run test -- src/features/client-portal
npm run test -- src/features/document-intelligence/litigation-command-center
```

### 5. Result (2026-05-24)

| 항목 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| Prisma migration + generate | **로컬 적용** |
| verify + Vitest | **로컬 PASS** |

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-CLIENT-SUPPLEMENT-TRACKING-PHASE15A]

### 1. 목적

Phase **15-A** — 변호사가 `SupplementRequest` **DRAFT→SENT** 발송 후, **의뢰인 포털**에서 보완요청 수신→응답 제출→제출 완료 흐름을 추적하고, **Litigation Command Center**에 `CLIENT_RESPONDED` 반영·재검토 CTA·피드·목록 우선순위까지 연결.

### 2. Scope

- `supplement-request.portal.ts` — CLIENT 숨김/응답 가능 상태 SSOT · Command Center flag 매핑
- `markSupplementRequestViewedByClientService` — GET detail 시 `SENT→CLIENT_VIEWED`
- `ClientSupplementTrackingClient` · `ClientSupplementTrackingPanel` — 의뢰인 추적 UI · 사건 상세 배너
- `startCommandCenterSupplementReviewService` — `CLIENT_RESPONDED→UNDER_REVIEW` + AuditLog + optimistic
- `litigation-command-center-list-summary` — `supplementAwaitingReviewCount` · priority 「보완 응답」
- Command Center schema version **`15-A.1`**

### 3. 15-A 경계

| 허용 | 금지 |
| --- | --- |
| 의뢰인 SENT 이후 노출 · 응답 게이트 | 의뢰인 DRAFT 열람 |
| Command Center 재검토 시작 CTA | 15-A 신규 Prisma migration |
| batch summary responded count | 의뢰인 Command Center 접근 |

### 4. 검증

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-supplement-tracking-phase15a
npm run test -- src/features/supplement-request/supplement-request.portal
npm run test -- src/features/document-intelligence/litigation-command-center
```

### 5. Result (2026-05-24)

| 항목 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `verify:aibeopchin-client-supplement-tracking-phase15a` | **PASS** (로컬) |
| Vitest portal + command-center | **PASS** (로컬) |

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-LEGAL-DOCUMENT-INTELLIGENCE-PHASE14B-LITIGATION-COMMAND-CENTER-ACTIONS]

### 1. 목적

Phase **14-B** — Litigation Command Center(14-A)에서 변호사·스태프가 **실제 업무를 처리**하는 액션 레이어. 업무 상태·기일·보완요청·준비서면 초안 생성을 Command Center 안에서 실행하고 AuditLog로 추적.

### 2. Scope

- `PATCH .../litigation-command-center/tasks/[taskId]` — OPEN/IN_PROGRESS/COMPLETED
- `PATCH .../litigation-command-center/deadlines/[deadlineId]` — 완료·연기(dueAt)·메모(description)
- `POST .../supplements/[requestId]/send` — 보완요청 DRAFT→SENT
- `POST .../draft-contexts/[draftContextId]/generate-draft` — 준비서면 초안 생성 + context READY
- `LitigationCommandCenterClient` — 섹션별 액션 버튼 · Review Console 바로가기 · `actionsEnabled` gate
- AuditLog: `LITIGATION_CMD_CENTER_*` 4종

### 3. 14-B 경계

| 허용 | 금지 |
| --- | --- |
| LAWYER/STAFF/ADMIN 액션 | CLIENT·readOnly 액션 |
| DRAFT 보완요청 발송 | SENT 이후 재발송 |
| 확정 draft context 초안 생성 | 미확정 AI 후보 downstream |
| 증거·상대방 서면 → Review Console 링크 | 미검토 항목 자동 확정 |

### 4. 검증

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-legal-document-intelligence-phase14b
npm run test -- src/features/document-intelligence/litigation-command-center
```

### 5. Result (2026-05-24)

| 항목 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `verify:aibeopchin-legal-document-intelligence-phase14b` | **PASS** |
| Vitest `litigation-command-center` + `litigation-command-center-actions` | **8 tests PASS** |

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-LEGAL-DOCUMENT-INTELLIGENCE-PHASE14A-LITIGATION-COMMAND-CENTER]

### 1. 목적

Phase **14-A** — Legal Document Intelligence RC(13-I) 위에 **Litigation Command Center** UI/UX. 사건 상세에서 기일·업무·상대방 서면·증거 매핑·검토 큐·운영 연동·보완요청·준비서면 컨텍스트를 한 화면에 통합. 미확정 AI 후보는 표시하되 downstream 실행은 차단·확정/후보 UI 분리.

- `GET /api/cases/[caseId]/litigation-command-center` · `/cases/[caseId]/litigation-command-center`
- `litigation-command-center.service.ts` — 13-E/F/G/H + SupplementRequest 통합 조회
- narrative summary — phaseLabel · headline · nextDeadlineText
- `LitigationCommandCenterClient` — 9개 섹션 + ops sync(13-H) + 검토 콘솔 링크
- 사건 상세 **소송 지휘실 열기** 버튼

| --- | --- |
| AI 후보 표시 + 검토 콘솔 링크 | 미확정 항목 downstream 직접 실행 |
| 확정 LitigationTask/Deadline 표시 | AI 후보를 확정처럼 표시 |
| STAFF/LAWYER ops sync (13-H policy) | CLIENT 접근 |

Phase **13-G** — 13-D/E/F 분석 후보를 **Lawyer Review Queue**로 통합. 변호사가 항목별 확인·수정·기각·의뢰인 확인 요청을 남기고, 9-F Judgment Ledger(`DOCUMENT_CLAIM`·`EVIDENCE_ITEM`·`DEADLINE` 등)에 바인딩. `LAWYER_CONFIRMED`/`LAWYER_CORRECTED` 전 downstream(서면·기일·의뢰인 공개) 확정값 사용 금지.

### 2. Scope

- `LitigationDocumentIntelligenceReviewDecision` (Prisma + migration `20260524210000`)
- `GET .../review-queue` · `POST .../review-queue/[itemId]/{confirm|edit|reject|request-client-confirmation}`
- Queue builder: 13-D claims/deadlines/issues/evidence/risk + 13-E + 13-F
- Ledger binding: `document-intelligence-review-ledger.ts`
- Lawyer Review Console 탭: **서류·증거 분석**
- AuditLog: `LITIGATION_DOC_INTEL_REVIEW_*`
- Policy: `assertConfirmedForDownstreamUse`

### 3. 13-G 경계

| 허용 | 금지 |
| --- | --- |
| CONFIRMED/EDITED/REJECTED/NEEDS_CLIENT_CONFIRMATION | 확정 전 서면·기일·의뢰인 공개 |
| Ledger entry (clientVisible=false) | clientVisible without release gate |

| --- | --- |

## [EVIDENCE-20260524-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE13A-LEGAL-DOCUMENT-INTELLIGENCE-SPEC-LOCK]

### 1. 목적

Phase **13-A** — **Legal Document Intelligence Engine (AI 서류·증거 분석 엔진)** Spec Lock.  
업로드 자료를 **분류·OCR/추출·문서별 분석·사건기록 대조·5분할 bundle·변호사 검토 gate**로 전환하는 설계 SSOT 확정. Litigation Operations(13-H)의 심장부.

### 2. 흐름 전환

**Before**: 상담 → 인터뷰 → 사건요약 → 문서작성 → 변호사 검토 (첨부는 메타만)  
**After**: 자료 업로드 → AI 분류/추출/분석/대조 → 변호사 검토 큐 → 서면·보완·기일 연결

### 3. 산출물

| # | 파일 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | `docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_LEGAL_DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_SPEC.md` — Master |
| 2 | `docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_UPLOAD_FILE_ANALYSIS_PIPELINE_SPEC.md` — 13-B/C |
| 3 | `docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_OPPONENT_BRIEF_ANALYSIS_SPEC.md` — 13-E |
| 4 | `docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_COURT_DOCUMENT_ANALYSIS_SPEC.md` — 13-D/E |
| 5 | `docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_EVIDENCE_MAPPING_SPEC.md` — 13-F |
| 6 | `src/features/document-intelligence/document-intelligence-engine.schema.ts` |
| 7 | `src/features/document-intelligence/document-intelligence-task-types.ts` |
| 8 | `scripts/verify-aibeopchin-legal-document-intelligence.mjs` |

### 4. 핵심 계약

- **5분할 bundle**: narrativeSummary · structuredData · recordComparison · lawyerActionRecommendations · draftContext
- **13 taskType**: `LEGAL_FILE_CLASSIFY` … `LITIGATION_DRAFT_CONTEXT_BUILD`
- **8 DB 모델 설계**: `LitigationUploadedFile` … `LitigationAnalysisReview` (Prisma 13-B+)
- **분석 상태**: `AI_ANALYZED` → `NEEDS_LAWYER_REVIEW` → `LAWYER_CONFIRMED` / `REJECTED` / `NEEDS_CLIENT_CONFIRMATION`

### 5. Phase 로드맵

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-LOGO-CELEBRATE-LOCKUP]

### 1. 목적

法 획 완성 후 **동일 SVG 글자**를 `transform: scale`로 서서히 확대(재필기·획 두께 변경 없음) → **360° 회전** → 획 재시작 loop. 헤더는 **높이 44px 고정**, 우측 텍스트만 layout 폭 증가로 밀림.

### 2. phase · surface

| phase | 동작 |
| --- | --- |
| `drawing` | 8획 순차 등장 |
| `scaling` | base 크기 글자 그대로 scale-up |
| `spinning` | 확대 상태에서 360° 회전 후 loop |

loop **2회차부터** `pickRandomLogoRainbowColor()`로 法 획 색을 7색 중 1색 랜덤 적용 (`rainbowCycleStroke`, restricted는 false).

| surface | celebrateScale |
| --- | --- |
| `header` | 44px / baseHeight (헤더 슬롯 채움) |
| `panel` | 1.15× (동일 글자 확대 후 회전) |

### 3. 산출물

| 파일 | 역할 |
| --- | --- |
| `src/lib/branding/aibeopchin-logo-celebrate.ts` | header slot·celebrate layout SSOT · `resolveLogoCelebrateLayout` |
| `src/lib/branding/aibeopchin-logo-celebrate.test.ts` | header 고정·panel no-resize 회귀 |
| `src/components/branding/aibeopchin-logo-lockup.tsx` | drawing → celebrating · `surface` prop |
| `src/components/brand/aibeopchin-logo.tsx` | nav `surface="header"` horizontal lockup |
| `src/components/dashboard/dashboard-living-header.tsx` | `surface="panel"` vertical lockup |

### 4. 검증

`npm run verify:aibeopchin-branding` · `aibeopchin-logo-celebrate.test.ts` 2 tests PASS.

---

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-CMB-STYLE-LOGO-RUNTIME]

### 1. 목적

CMB Framework 패턴(SSOT config → role resolver → motion policy → validator → verify)을 **브랜딩·Living Logo**에 적용. CaseType/CMB block 레이어와 분리하고 CORE 고정 브랜드 + 역할별 mode만 런타임에서 해석한다.

### 2. 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 역할 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Runtime | `src/lib/branding/aibeopchin-logo-runtime.ts` | `resolveLogoMode` · `resolveLogoPresentation` · `getLogoModeConfig` |
| Validator | `src/lib/branding/aibeopchin-logo-validator.ts` | mode·role registry fail-closed 정적 검사 |
| Mode SSOT | `src/lib/branding/aibeopchin-logo-v2-mode-config.ts` | `accentTone` · particles/orbit/pulse |
| Motion policy | `src/lib/branding/aibeopchin-logo-v2-motion-policy.ts` | mode config 기반 · reduced-motion downgrade |
| UI | `src/components/branding/aibeopchin-logo-v2.tsx` | glyph + particles + orbit · light/dark variant |
| Dashboard | `src/components/dashboard/dashboard-living-header.tsx` | runtime resolver · V2 기본 · `variant="light"` |
| Verify | `scripts/verify-aibeopchin-branding.mjs` | 정적 registry + Vitest |

### 3. npm scripts

```bash
npm run verify:aibeopchin-branding
npx vitest run src/lib/branding/aibeopchin-logo-runtime.test.ts
```

### 4. 검증

| 항목 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `verify:aibeopchin-branding` | **PASS** (에이전트 실행) |
| Vitest `aibeopchin-logo-runtime.test.ts` | **6 tests PASS** |
| CMB block/registry 확장 | **없음** (의도적 — CORE 브랜딩 영역) |

---

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-STAGING-SECRETS-LIVE-PHASE]

### 1. 목적

**Phase A — Staging Secrets 실측**. AI Core 배포 후보 상태에서 **migration 구조 개편(B)보다 먼저**, staging에서 secrets·OAuth callback·production `NODE_ENV`·역할 API 경계를 실측한다.

### 2. 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 역할 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Phase runbook | [`STAGING_SECRETS_LIVE_VERIFICATION_PHASE.md`](../operations/STAGING_SECRETS_LIVE_VERIFICATION_PHASE.md) | Step 1〜4 · 증빙 · FAIL 분기 |
| Env policy | [`staging-secrets-env-policy.mjs`](../../scripts/lib/staging-secrets-env-policy.mjs) | 검증 SSOT (값 미로그) |
| Verifier | [`verify-staging-secrets.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-staging-secrets.mjs) | `--db-ping` · OAuth callback URL 출력 |
| Live orchestrator | [`ops-staging-secrets-live-check.mjs`](../../scripts/ops-staging-secrets-live-check.mjs) | env + health + role smoke |
| Role smoke (staging) | [`ops-ai-core-role-smoke.mjs`](../../scripts/ops-ai-core-role-smoke.mjs) | `OPS_SMOKE_*` · `OPS_SMOKE_CASE_ID` |

### 3. npm scripts

```bash
npm run verify:staging-secrets -- --db-ping
npm run ops:staging-secrets-live-check
npm run test:staging-secrets-policy
```

### 4. 실측 상태

| 항목 | 로컬 | staging |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `test:staging-secrets-policy` | **PASS** (정책 unit) | — |
| H-1 STAFF refresh guard | **PASS** (`case-intelligence-review.permissions.test.ts`) | — |
| Role smoke | **19 checks** (negative + STAFF refresh 403) | **운영자 실행 대기** |
| `verify:staging-secrets --db-ping --oauth-smoke` | `STAGING_SECRETS_VERIFY_RELAXED=1` dry-run | **운영자 실행 대기** |
| Tier 4 RC | **9-D/E/F** verify ai-core-rc 편입 | — |
| `predeploy:check` | **canonical-sources** 포함 | — |

> staging URL·secrets·계정은 저장소 밖. PASS 시 본 블록 §4 표만 갱신.

### 5. 후속 (Phase B — 보류)

[DB_MIGRATION_CHRONOLOGY.md](../operations/DB_MIGRATION_CHRONOLOGY.md) — greenfield `migrate deploy` · 50 migration squash. **Phase A PASS 후** 또는 staging migration BLOCKED 시 착수.

### 6. 한 줄 판정

**Phase A 도구·절차·RBAC 보완 완료** — staging secrets · OAuth callback · 역할 smoke **19 checks** 실측 PASS가 운영 배포 전 **마지막 현실 검증 게이트**이다.

### 7. 외부 평가 대응 보완 (2026-05-23)

| ID | 조치 |
| --- | --- |
| H-1 | `refreshCaseIntelligenceReviewSnapshot` → `canPersistIntelligenceJudgment` + permissions test |
| H-2 | Tier 4 RC에 `verify:aibeopchin-case-intelligence-graph` · contradiction-radar · lawyer-judgment-ledger 편입 |
| H-3/H-4 | `ops-ai-core-role-smoke` **19 checks** · remote `OPS_SMOKE_*` 필수 |
| M-1 | `predeploy:check` → `verify:canonical-sources` |
| M-5/M-4 | staging policy: `AUTH_COOKIE_SECURE` · placeholder secret · `--oauth-smoke` |
| M-6 | CI `verify-349-12` + `test:staging-secrets-policy` |

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PREDEPLOY-OPS-CHECK]

### 1. 목적

Phase **12-A Full AI Core RC** 직후 **로컬 배포 전 운영 점검** — env · DB · RC verify · `predeploy:check` · 역할별 API 스모크를 한 번에 재현·통과한다.

### 2. 선행 조건

| 항목 | 로컬 값 |
| --- | --- |
| PostgreSQL | `localhost:5432` / DB `aibeopchin` |
| `.env` / `.env.local` | `DATABASE_URL`, JWT, AI Core 9 keys, OAuth placeholder 등 (`.env.example` 기준) |
| DB 스키마 | greenfield `npm run db:migrate`는 migration chronology 이슈 → **`npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss` + `npm run db:seed`** |
| dev server | `npm run ops:ai-core-role-smoke` 전 **`npm run dev`** |

> **주의**: `.env`의 `NODE_ENV=development`는 Vitest `React.act`·Next production build를 깨뜨릴 수 있다. `predeploy:check`는 build=`production`·test=`test`로 강제한다.

### 3. 검증 결과 (2026-05-23 KST)

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-full-ai-core-rc` | **PASS** |
| `npm run predeploy:check` | **PASS** (Voice · Gongbuho · CMB · AI Core RC · supplement · tsc · lint · **623 tests** · **build**) |
| `npm run ops:ai-core-role-smoke` | **PASS** (CLIENT/LAWYER/STAFF/ADMIN API 역할 경계) |

### 4. 이번 점검 중 코드 보완

| 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- |
| `scripts/predeploy-check.ts` | build `NODE_ENV=production`, unit test `NODE_ENV=test` |
| `scripts/ops-ai-core-role-smoke.mjs` | 역할별 AI Core API 스모크 (seed + CaseAssignment) |
| `package.json` | `ops:ai-core-role-smoke` 스크립트 |
| `illegal-lending-promo-variants.ts` · `illegal-lending-popup-policy.ts` | SSR `localStorage` 가드 |
| `gongbuho-sample-library-json.contract.test.ts` | `@vitest-environment node` |

### 5. 잔여 운영 항목 (로컬 PASS ≠ 운영 배포)

1. **운영/스테이징 DB** — incremental migration 이력 전제; greenfield `db:deploy` chronology는 별도 baseline 정리 필요.
2. **실제 secrets** — 스테이징·운영 `DATABASE_URL`·OAuth·AI provider keys는 배포 환경에서 설정.
3. **수동 UI QA** — Playwright E2E·관리자 화면 실측은 본 증빙 범위 밖.

### 6. 한 줄 판정

AI Core RC(12-A) 기준 **정적 게이트 + predeploy:check + 역할 API 스모크**까지 로컬에서 **재현·통과**했다.

### 7. 운영 절차 문서 (2026-05-23 추가)

| 문서 | 내용 |
| --- | --- |
| [`AIBEOPCHIN_PREDEPLOY_LOCAL_CI_RUNBOOK.md`](../operations/AIBEOPCHIN_PREDEPLOY_LOCAL_CI_RUNBOOK.md) | predeploy 전 dev 종료 · Windows Prisma DLL lock · NODE_ENV · CI fresh build |
| [`DB_MIGRATION_CHRONOLOGY.md`](../operations/DB_MIGRATION_CHRONOLOGY.md) | incremental `migrate deploy` vs greenfield chronology |
| [`STAGING_SECRETS_CHECKLIST.md`](../operations/STAGING_SECRETS_CHECKLIST.md) | staging secrets · AI Core 9 keys · migration 점검 |
| [`.github/workflows/ci.yml`](../../.github/workflows/ci.yml) | `predeploy-fresh-build` job — dev 서버 없이 `predeploy:check` |

**한 줄 (갱신)**: AI Core는 **배포 후보 상태** — 남은 문제는 **코드 결함이 아니라** 운영 DB migration 이력 · secrets · staging 실측 · 로컬/CI 실행 절차 준수이다.

---

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE12A-FULL-AI-CORE-RC-CLOSURE]

### 1. 목적

Phase **12-A** — **Full AI Core Release Candidate / Predeploy Master Closure**. Tier **1〜4**(Document 8-E · Case Summary 9-C · Governance 10-D · Client Disclosure 11-D)를 **배포 가능한 하나의 AI Core RC 체계**로 묶는다.

> 기능 추가 없음 — migration · env · role binding · evidence · verify chain **마스터 봉인**.

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RC Summary | [`AIBEOPCHIN_FULL_AI_CORE_RC_LOCK_SUMMARY.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_FULL_AI_CORE_RC_LOCK_SUMMARY.md) | Tier 1〜4 + master 매트릭스 |
| Checklist | [`AIBEOPCHIN_FULL_AI_CORE_PREDEPLOY_MASTER_CHECKLIST.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_FULL_AI_CORE_PREDEPLOY_MASTER_CHECKLIST.md) | predeploy master 체크 |
| SSOT | [`full-ai-core-rc-lock.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/full-ai-core-rc-lock.ts) | marker · migration · env · evidence stack |
| Verify (semantic) | [`verify-aibeopchin-full-ai-core-rc.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-full-ai-core-rc.mjs) | Full RC wrapper |
| Master block | [`run-full-ai-core-rc-block.mjs`](../../scripts/lib/run-full-ai-core-rc-block.mjs) | ai-core-rc Tier master 편입 |

### 3. Predeploy 연동 (gate 개수 불변)

```
predeploy:check → verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc
  Tier 1 Document 8-E
  Tier 2 Case Summary 9-C
  Tier 3 Governance 10-D
  Tier 4 Client Disclosure 11-D
  Master Full Closure 12-A
```

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-full-ai-core-rc` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` | Tier 1+2+3+4+Master **PASS** |
| Full baseline migrations (3 dirs) | **존재** |
| `.env.example` env SSOT (9 keys) | **정합** |
| Role binding Vitest spot (3 files) | **PASS** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

AI법친의 **문서 AI · 사건 이해 AI · 거버넌스 · 의뢰인 공개 통제**가 **하나의 배포 전 최종 RC 게이트**(`verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc`)로 묶였다.

---

> Review Console → Preview/Release → Client Portal Delivery 파이프라인이 **배포 레벨 RC**로 고정된다.

| ai-core-rc | [`ai-rc-lock.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/ai-rc-lock.ts) · [`verify-aibeopchin-ai-core-rc.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-ai-core-rc.mjs) | Tier 4 additive |

**선행 RC (불변)**: Tier 1 Document 8-E · Tier 2 Case Summary 9-C · Tier 3 Governance 10-D.

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-disclosure-rc` | **PASS** |

| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-disclosure-preview` | 11-B **유지** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-disclosure-delivery` | 11-C **유지** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-rc` | 10-D **유지** |
| Client Disclosure Vitest bundle (4 files) | **PASS** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

AI법친 **의뢰인 공개 운영체제**(Review → Release → Delivery)가 **11-D RC**로 봉인되어, preview·graph·unreleased ledger가 **구조적으로** 의뢰인 포털에서 차단된다.

Phase **11-C** — **Client Disclosure Delivery / Client Portal Binding**. **Release된 `CaseClientDisclosureRelease`만** 의뢰인 포털에서 조회 가능. unreleased preview · 내부 `intelligenceGraph` **절대 노출 금지**.

| Schema | [`client-disclosure-delivery.schema.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/client-disclosure-delivery.schema.ts) | `11-C.1` |

| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-client-disclosure-delivery.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-client-disclosure-delivery.mjs) | 정적 게이트 |

### 3. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |

| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/client-disclosure-delivery.service.test.ts` | **PASS** |

의뢰인 포털은 **release audit에 묶인 공개 정보만** 본다 — preview·graph·unreleased ledger는 구조적으로 차단된다.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE10D-AI-GOVERNANCE-RC-CLOSURE]

### 1. 목적

Phase **10-D** — **AI Governance RC Lock & Predeploy Closure**. Phase **10-A**〜**10-C**를 **하나의 운영 단위**로 봉인하여, AI법친 사건 이해 AI가 **책임·권한·감사·공개 통제**까지 갖춘 **법률 AI 운영체제 RC**가 된다.

> 요약 → Graph → Radar → Ledger → Governance → Audit → Client Disclosure 파이프라인이 **배포 레벨 RC**로 고정된다.

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RC Summary | [`AIBEOPCHIN_AI_GOVERNANCE_RC_LOCK_SUMMARY.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_AI_GOVERNANCE_RC_LOCK_SUMMARY.md) | Tier 3 매트릭스 · 불변 기준 |
| Checklist | [`AIBEOPCHIN_AI_GOVERNANCE_PREDEPLOY_CLOSURE_CHECKLIST.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_AI_GOVERNANCE_PREDEPLOY_CLOSURE_CHECKLIST.md) | predeploy 체크 |
| SSOT | [`ai-governance-rc-lock.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/ai-governance-rc-lock.ts) | marker · verify chain · vitest bundle |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-ai-governance-rc.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-ai-governance-rc.mjs) | Tier 3 standalone |
| Shared block | [`run-ai-governance-rc-block.mjs`](../../scripts/lib/run-ai-governance-rc-block.mjs) | ai-core-rc Tier 3 편입 |

### 3. RC 매트릭스 (10-A〜D)

| Phase | verify |
| --- | --- |
| **10-A** | `verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-control` |
| **10-B** | `verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-audit` |
| **10-C** | `verify:aibeopchin-client-safe-disclosure` |
| **10-D** | `verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-rc` |

**선행 RC (불변)**: Tier 1 Document 8-E · Tier 2 Case Summary 9-C — `verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` 확장본.

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-rc` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` | Tier 1+2+3 **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-control` | 10-A baseline **유지** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-audit` | 10-B baseline **유지** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-safe-disclosure` | 10-C baseline **유지** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-case-summary-rc` | 9-C RC **유지** |
| Governance Vitest bundle (9 files) | **PASS** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

AI법친은 **통제(10-A) · 감사·미터(10-B) · 의뢰인 공개(10-C)** 가 **10-D RC**로 봉인되어, 일반 법률 챗봇과 구분되는 **법률 AI 운영체제**가 완성되었다.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE10C-CLIENT-SAFE-DISCLOSURE-LAYER]

### 1. 목적

Phase **10-C** — **Client-Safe Disclosure Layer**. 내부 법률 지능(graph · radar · ledger draft)과 **의뢰인 공개 정보**를 분리한다.

> 의뢰인에게 보여도 되는 것만 보여준다. Radar · 내부 메모 · PENDING Ledger는 절대 노출하지 않는다.

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Spec | [`AIBEOPCHIN_CLIENT_SAFE_DISCLOSURE_LAYER_SPEC.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_CLIENT_SAFE_DISCLOSURE_LAYER_SPEC.md) | 공개 조건 · audience split |
| Schema | [`client-safe-disclosure.schema.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/client-safe-disclosure.schema.ts) | `10-C.1` · statements · blocked categories |
| Service | [`client-safe-disclosure.service.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/client-safe-disclosure.service.ts) | project · apply to summary |
| Validator | [`client-safe-disclosure-validator.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/client-safe-disclosure-validator.ts) | bundle guardrail |
| Runtime | [`case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts) | `clientSafeDisclosure` · CLIENT filter |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-client-safe-disclosure.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-client-safe-disclosure.mjs) | 정적 게이트 |

### 3. 공개 조건 (AND)

1. Ledger `CLIENT_VISIBLE` lane  
2. `CONFIRMED` \| `EDITED`  
3. 10-A `canReleaseLedgerEntryToClient` (case status)

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-client-safe-disclosure` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-audit` | 10-B baseline **유지** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/client-safe-disclosure.schema.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/client-safe-disclosure.service.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/client-safe-disclosure-validator.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-case-summary-rc` | RC **유지** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

AI법친 사건 이해 AI 파이프라인 **요약 → Graph → Radar → Ledger → Governance → Audit → Client Disclosure**가 완성되어, **내부 지능과 의뢰인 공개 정보**가 분리되었다.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE10A-AI-GOVERNANCE-CONTROL-MATRIX]

### 1. 목적

Phase **10-A** — **AI Governance Control Matrix**. 9-F 책임 경계 위에 **조직·역할·사건 단위 AI 사용 통제권**을 정의한다.

| 9-F | 10-A |
| --- | --- |
| AI·변호사 책임 경계 (Ledger) | tenant/role/case invoke·view·client-release gate |

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Spec | [`AIBEOPCHIN_AI_GOVERNANCE_CONTROL_MATRIX.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_AI_GOVERNANCE_CONTROL_MATRIX.md) | 5+1 통제 질문 · default matrix |
| Schema | [`ai-governance-control.schema.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/ai-governance-control.schema.ts) | `10-A.1` · features · tenantPolicy |
| Policy | [`ai-governance-policy.service.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/ai-governance-policy.service.ts) | `evaluateAiGovernanceGate` · view filter |
| Validator | [`ai-governance-validator.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/ai-governance-validator.ts) | matrix consistency |
| Runtime | [`case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts) | invoke gate + graph visibility |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-ai-governance-control.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-ai-governance-control.mjs) | 정적 게이트 |

### 3. 통제 축 (요약)

1. **masterEnableRoles** — AI 마스터 스위치 (ADMIN)
2. **allowedCaseStatuses** — 사건별 AI eligibility
3. **roleInvoke / roleView** — feature별 invoke/view
4. **clientVisibleMinCaseStatus** — 의뢰인 공개 최소 상태 (`REVIEW_PENDING`)
5. **tenantPolicy** — feature lock · budget hooks

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-governance-control` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-lawyer-judgment-ledger` | 9-F baseline **유지** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/ai-governance-control.schema.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/ai-governance-policy.service.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/ai-governance-validator.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-case-summary-rc` | RC **유지** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

AI법친 사건 이해 AI는 **요약 → Graph → Radar → Ledger → Governance Matrix**까지 연결되어, 일반 법률 챗봇과 다른 **책임·통제 이중 구조**를 갖추었다.

### 1. 목적

Phase **9-F** — **Lawyer Judgment Boundary Ledger**. 9-E Radar 위에 **AI 감지 · 변호사 확인/기각/수정 · 의뢰인 공개 · 제출 가능** 6경계를 Ledger로 기록한다.

**책임 구조**: AI는 구조화했고, 변호사가 판단했다.

| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-lawyer-judgment-ledger.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-lawyer-judgment-ledger.mjs) | 정적 게이트 |

**요약(9-B) → Graph(9-D) → Radar(9-E) → Ledger(9-F)** — `summary/generate` `intelligenceGraph`에 `{ graph, radar, ledger }` 포함.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE9E-CONTRADICTION-RADAR]

### 1. 목적

Phase **9-E** — **Contradiction Radar & Graph Runtime Integration**. 9-D Graph 위에 5축(인터뷰·첨부·공부호·Claim·변호사 메모) rule-based Radar를 올리고, `summary/generate` 응답에 `intelligenceGraph`를 **additive** 편입한다.

**불변 원칙**: AI는 판단하지 않는다 — 모순·누락·위험 **신호**만 구조화하고, 최종 판단은 변호사가 한다.

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Spec | [`AIBEOPCHIN_CONTRADICTION_RADAR_SPEC.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_CONTRADICTION_RADAR_SPEC.md) | 5축 · signal types · API |
| Radar | [`case-contradiction-radar.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-contradiction-radar.ts) | `scanCaseContradictionRadar` · `9-E.1` |
| Runtime | [`case-intelligence-graph-runtime.service.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-intelligence-graph-runtime.service.ts) | Graph build + radar attach |
| Validator | [`case-contradiction-validator.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-contradiction-validator.ts) | Signal guardrail |
| Integration | [`case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts) | `intelligenceGraph` on generate |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-contradiction-radar.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-contradiction-radar.mjs) | 정적 게이트 |

### 3. API (additive)

`POST /api/cases/[caseId]/summary/generate` → `summary.intelligenceGraph` `{ graph, radar, radarValidationPassed }`  
기존 `content` · `disclaimer` shape **하위 호환**.

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-contradiction-radar` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-case-intelligence-graph` | 9-D baseline **유지** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-contradiction-radar.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-contradiction-validator.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-intelligence-graph-runtime.service.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.test.ts` | **PASS** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

Case Intelligence Graph(9-D) 위에 **5축 Contradiction Radar + summary/generate runtime 편입**이 완료되어, 변호사가 **출처·모순·미검토 쟁점**을 API로 받을 수 있다. **9-F** Lawyer Judgment Boundary Ledger 착수 가능.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE9D-CASE-INTELLIGENCE-GRAPH-SPEC]

### 1. 목적

Phase **9-D** — **Case Intelligence Graph Spec**. Case Summary flat text를 넘어, **모든 요약 Claim**을 출처·근거·confidence·변호사 검토상태와 연결하는 Graph schema·provenance·validator를 잠근다.

**불변 원칙**: AI는 판단하지 않는다. AI는 주장·근거·출처·모순·누락을 구조화하고, 최종 판단은 변호사가 한다.

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Spec | [`AIBEOPCHIN_CASE_INTELLIGENCE_GRAPH_SPEC.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_CASE_INTELLIGENCE_GRAPH_SPEC.md) | Graph 개념 · 예시 Claim · Phase 로드맵 |
| Schema | [`case-intelligence-graph.schema.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-intelligence-graph.schema.ts) | `9-D.1` · `CaseIntelligenceClaim` · enums |
| Provenance | [`case-summary-provenance-map.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-provenance-map.ts) | Output Spec §6 ↔ API ↔ Claim draft |
| Validator | [`case-summary-claim-validator.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-claim-validator.ts) | 출처 필수 · 최종 판단 금지 |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-case-intelligence-graph.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-case-intelligence-graph.mjs) | 정적 게이트 |
| Tests | `case-intelligence-graph.schema.test.ts` · `case-summary-provenance-map.test.ts` · `case-summary-claim-validator.test.ts` | Vitest |

### 3. 범위 경계

- **In scope**: schema · provenance map · claim validator · verify · docs · index export
- **Out of scope (9-E+)**: `summary/generate` API graph 노출 · Contradiction Radar · DB persist · LLM extraction

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-case-intelligence-graph` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-intelligence-graph.schema.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-summary-provenance-map.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-summary-claim-validator.test.ts` | **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-case-summary-rc` | 9-C baseline **유지** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

Case Summary RC(9-C) 위에 **출처 추적형 Claim Graph** spec·schema·validator가 잠겼고, **9-E**에서 flat 요약 API 위에 Graph runtime을 안전하게 올릴 수 있다.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE9C-CASE-SUMMARY-RC-CLOSURE]

### 1. 목적

Phase **9-C-FIX / 9-C** — **Case Summary RC Closure**. 9-B runtime 위에 LOCK_AFTER 정책 정합 · Tier2 verify(순환 제거) · output mapping · env fail-fast · RC verify chain을 봉인한다.

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Policy fix | [`case-summary-ai-core-policy.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-ai-core-policy.ts) | LOCK_AFTER gate · `assertCaseSummaryAiModeEnvValidForRc` |
| RC block | [`run-case-summary-rc-block.mjs`](../../scripts/lib/run-case-summary-rc-block.mjs) | Tier2 shared (no circular npm calls) |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-case-summary-rc.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-case-summary-rc.mjs) | standalone Tier2 |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-ai-core-rc.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-ai-core-rc.mjs) | Tier1 + Tier2 |
| ai-rc-lock | [`ai-rc-lock.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/ai-rc-lock.ts) | Tier2 = phase9a/9b only |
| Mapping | Integration Spec §11.1 | `CASE_SUMMARY_OUTPUT_SPEC_TO_API_FIELD_MAPPING` |
| RC docs | Case Summary RC summary/checklist | **RC LOCKED** |

### 3. 불변 기준

1. **LOCK_AFTER_LAWYER_REVIEW** — unlocked generate/regenerate **true**, locked **false** (8 tests).
2. **Tier2 verify** — `phase9a` → `phase9b` → static → Vitest; **does not exec** standalone script from integrated RC.
3. **env** — invalid `CASE_SUMMARY_AI_MODE` → RC **fail-fast**; unset → RULE_BASED.
4. **8-E 유지** — Document Tier1 unchanged.

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-case-summary-rc` | Tier2 **PASS** |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` | Tier1+2 **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-summary-ai-core-policy.test.ts` | 8 gate tests **PASS** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

Case Summary AI는 **정책·verify·mapping·env 검증**이 RC로 닫혔고, Gongbuho/Voice/CMB AI Assist 또는 Case Intelligence Graph(9-D) 착수 전 baseline이 고정되었다.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE9C-CASE-SUMMARY-RC-DESIGN]

### 1. 목적

Phase **9-C** — **Case Summary RC Closure 설계**. 9-B runtime 위에 Case Summary RC 문서·`verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` **Tier 2 확장안**·`verify:aibeopchin-case-summary-rc` standalone을 정의한다. **구현·봉인은 본 설계 승인 후 착수.**

### 2. 설계 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RC summary | [`AIBEOPCHIN_CASE_SUMMARY_RC_LOCK_SUMMARY.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_CASE_SUMMARY_RC_LOCK_SUMMARY.md) | 9-C RC 매트릭스 · 불변 기준 |
| Checklist | [`AIBEOPCHIN_CASE_SUMMARY_PREDEPLOY_CLOSURE_CHECKLIST.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_CASE_SUMMARY_PREDEPLOY_CLOSURE_CHECKLIST.md) | 배포 전 체크 |
| Extension | [`AIBEOPCHIN_AI_CORE_RC_PHASE9C_EXTENSION_DESIGN.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_AI_CORE_RC_PHASE9C_EXTENSION_DESIGN.md) | ai-core-rc Tier 1+2 설계 |
| SSOT | [`case-summary-rc-lock.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-rc-lock.ts) | marker · verify chain · env keys |
| ai-rc-lock | [`ai-rc-lock.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/ai-rc-lock.ts) | Tier 2 script 목록 (additive) |

### 3. verify 확장안 (요약)

```
verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc
  = runDocumentAiCoreRcBlock()   // 8-E Tier 1 (불변)
  + runCaseSummaryRcBlock()      // 9-C Tier 2 (신규)

verify:aibeopchin-case-summary-rc  // Tier 2 standalone
```

`predeploy:check` — gate 추가·순서 변경 **없음**; AI Core gate 내부만 확장.

### 4. 구현 착수 조건

- `verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-phase9a` · `phase9b` **PASS** (현재 충족)
- 본 설계 승인
- 구현 후 태그: `[EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE9C-CASE-SUMMARY-RC-CLOSURE]`

### 5. 한 줄 판정

9-B “사건 이해 AI” runtime 위에 **9-C RC 봉인 설계**가 준비되었고, **`verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` Tier 2 additive 확장**으로 Document RC(8-E)를 깨지 않고 predeploy gate 1개로 통합할 수 있다.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-AI-CORE-PHASE9B-CASE-SUMMARY-RUNTIME]

### 1. 목적

Phase **9-B** — **Case Summary AI Core Route & Runtime**. Phase 9-A 스펙 위에 context builder · runtime · Prompt Registry `9-B.1` · `summary/generate` ai-core 위임을 구현한다.

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Context | [`case-summary-context-builder.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-context-builder.ts) | 인터뷰·공부호·rule buckets |
| Runtime | [`case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.ts) | `invokeCaseSummaryGenerate` |
| Registry | [`case-summary-prompt-registry.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-prompt-registry.ts) | `9-B.1` · `case.summary.*` |
| Provider | [`case-summary-openai.provider.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-openai.provider.ts) | case summary `responses.create` |
| Audit | [`case-summary-audit.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/case-summary-audit.ts) | `caseSummaryAiMode` metadata |
| Route | [`summary/generate/route.ts`](../../src/app/api/cases/[caseId]/summary/generate/route.ts) | ai-core 위임 · shape 유지 |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-ai-core-phase9b.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-ai-core-phase9b.mjs) | 9-B 게이트 |

### 3. 불변 기준

1. **document RC** — `AI_PROMPT_REGISTRY_VERSION = 8-C.1` · document openai provider 불변.
2. **기본 모드** — `RULE_BASED` (LLM skip, legacy heuristic 유지).
3. **API 호환** — `summary.content.*` · `contractSections` · `disclaimer` 응답 shape 유지.
4. **Audit** — `promptVersion=9-B.1` · `caseSummaryAiMode` · public-safe metadata.
5. **9-A 유지** — `verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-phase9a` PASS.

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-phase9b` | Phase 9-B **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/features/ai-core/case-summary-ai-core-runtime.service.test.ts src/features/ai-core/case-summary-context-builder.test.ts src/features/ai-core/case-summary-prompt-registry.test.ts` | 단위 **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/app/api/cases/[caseId]/summary/generate/route.test.ts` | Route **PASS** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

Phase 9-A 스펙 위에 **사건 요약 ai-core runtime**이 연결되어 AI법친은 rule-based 1차 요약을 유지하면서 **Case Summary AI(`AI_ENRICH`/`AI_REGENERATE`)** 를 env로 켤 수 있는 “사건 이해 AI” 1차 구현에 도달했다.

### 1. 목적

### 2. 반영 산출물

| --- | --- | --- |
| RC lock | [`ai-rc-lock.ts`](../../src/features/ai-core/ai-rc-lock.ts) | marker · env keys · baseline migration · phase verify chain |
| RC summary | [`AIBEOPCHIN_AI_CORE_RC_LOCK_SUMMARY.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_AI_CORE_RC_LOCK_SUMMARY.md) | RC 매트릭스 · 불변 기준 |
| Checklist | [`AIBEOPCHIN_AI_CORE_PREDEPLOY_CLOSURE_CHECKLIST.md`](../../docs/ai/AIBEOPCHIN_AI_CORE_PREDEPLOY_CLOSURE_CHECKLIST.md) | env · migration · audit-policy · shim · predeploy |
| Verify | [`verify-aibeopchin-ai-core-rc.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-aibeopchin-ai-core-rc.mjs) | Post-Ops + 8-A〜D + RC 정적 게이트 |
| Predeploy | [`predeploy-check.ts`](../../scripts/predeploy-check.ts) | `verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` gate |

### 3. 불변 기준

1. **RC chain** — `verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc`가 Post-Ops + phase8a〜d + Vitest ai-core를 순차 실행.
2. **Provider env** — `.env.example` OpenAI 키·모델 문서화 (미설정 시 fallback).
3. **Schema baseline** — `20260418180000_domain_definitions_phase1` · `generationMode`.
4. **Shim lock** — `PHASE8D_DOCUMENT_PARAGRAPH_AI_DEPRECATED_SHIM` on legacy shims.
5. **Audit API** — `GET /api/admin/ai-core/audit-policy` + E2E smoke spec 존재.
6. **8-D 유지** — evidence stack 8-A〜D 태그 IMPLEMENTATION_EVIDENCE에 존재.

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-rc` | Phase 8-E **PASS** |
| `npm run predeploy:check` | AI Core RC gate 포함 |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

Phase 8-D native context·audit closure 위에 **RC 문서·verify chain·predeploy gate**가 연결되어 AI Core가 **자체 AI 운영 봉인(RC) 직전 → RC 완료** 상태에 도달했다. 이후 Case Summary / Gongbuho / Voice / CMB AI Assist 확장 착수 가능.

2. **Audit** — generate snapshot `aiAuditTrail` + `persistAiCoreAudit`; legal regen per-call audit.

4. **8-A 유지** — `verify:aibeopchin-ai-core-phase8a` · Post-Ops verify PASS.

## [EVIDENCE-20260523-AIBEOPCHIN-POST-OPS-CRITICAL-FIX]

### 1. 목적

Phase 8-A(AI Core) 착수 **전** Post-Ops **Critical Fix (PR-1)** — Legal document 문단 재생성 스텁 제거·Draft와 동일 LLM 경로 통합, STAFF `/admin/voice`·`/admin/cmb` UI 접근 불일치 수정.

### 2. 반영 산출물

| 구분 | 파일 | 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| B1 | [`document-ai.ts`](../../src/lib/document-ai.ts) | `regenerateParagraphContent` → `rewriteParagraphWithOpenAI` + fallback + `checkForbiddenAssertions` |
| B1 | [`regenerate/route.ts`](../../src/app/api/legal-documents/[legalDocumentId]/paragraphs/[paragraphId]/regenerate/route.ts) | 새 시그니처·`mapLegalDocumentTypeToTemplateType` |
| B1 | [`document-paragraph-ai.prompts.ts`](../../src/features/document-drafts/document-paragraph-ai.prompts.ts) | rewrite instructions에 `buildDocumentGenerationGuardrail` |
| G1 | [`ops-admin-paths.ts`](../../src/lib/auth/ops-admin-paths.ts) | `STAFF_ADMIN_ALLOWED_PREFIXES`에 `/admin/voice`, `/admin/cmb` |
| G1 | [`ops-admin-paths.test.ts`](../../src/lib/auth/__tests__/ops-admin-paths.test.ts) | voice/cmb 회귀 |
| Verify | [`verify-post-ops-critical-fix.mjs`](../../scripts/verify-post-ops-critical-fix.mjs) | 정적 게이트 |
| Test | [`document-ai.test.ts`](../../src/lib/document-ai.test.ts) | 스텁 미사용·guardrail |

### 3. 불변 기준

1. **재생성** — `[재작성 지시 반영]` 스텁 제거; OpenAI rewrite 또는 fallback만 사용.
2. **가드레일** — `DOCUMENT_REGENERATE_GUARDRAIL_VIOLATION` 시 ValidationError.
3. **STAFF UI** — `/admin/voice/*`, `/admin/cmb/*` 미들웨어 허용(Ops 스펙 정합).
4. **ADMIN-only** — 기존 ADMIN 전용 경로 변경 없음.

### 4. 검증

| 명령 | 결과 |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run verify:post-ops-critical-fix` | 정적 게이트 **PASS** |
| `npm run test -- src/lib/auth/__tests__/ops-admin-paths.test.ts src/lib/document-ai.test.ts` | 단위 **PASS** |

### 5. 한 줄 판정

RC·Ops 3축 이후 **Legal doc regen 스텁**과 **STAFF Voice/CMB 차단**을 닫았으며, Phase 8-A AI Core 착수 전 안전 기준선이 `verify:post-ops-critical-fix`에 연결되었다.
